goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should 'arrive by 20:45'.
The train should go to 'birmingham new street' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be in the 'south' and should 'include free wifi'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in 'the type of guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should arrive by 20:45
The train should go to birmingham new street and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the south and should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get address and whether they have free parking
